storylets.title: {=order_treat_wounded_accept_title}The field after
storylets.setup: {=order_treat_wounded_accept_setup}Men lie under canvas in rough rows — some will walk tomorrow, some will not. The surgeon has more wounded than hands. Your lord asks if you can help. Whatever you say now, you will see things.

options.text: {=order_treat_wounded_accept_diligent_text}Roll up your sleeves. Work where needed.
{=order_treat_wounded_accept_sociable_text}Sit with the men. Voices, not bandages.
{=order_treat_wounded_accept_slack_text}Carry water. Stay clear of the red parts.
{=order_treat_wounded_accept_scheme_text}A dying man has no use for his ring.
{=order_treat_wounded_accept_decline_text}Walk away. Not your work.

storylets.title: {=order_treat_wounded_mid_bad_leg_title}A leg going bad
storylets.setup: {=order_treat_wounded_mid_bad_leg_setup}The man on the pallet has a leg that smells wrong. The surgeon says amputate. The man says no. A decision falls between them; the surgeon looks at you.

options.text: {=order_treat_wounded_mid_bad_leg_cut_text}Hold him down. Help the surgeon.
{=order_treat_wounded_mid_bad_leg_talk_text}Talk with the wounded man. Help him choose.

storylets.title: {=order_treat_wounded_mid_dying_boy_title}A young soldier
storylets.setup: {=order_treat_wounded_mid_dying_boy_setup}He is perhaps eighteen. Gut-shot. The surgeon has already passed him over for those he can save. The boy is awake and asking for his mother. You have water and time.

options.text: {=order_treat_wounded_mid_dying_boy_sit_text}Sit. Hold his hand. Talk until it is quiet.
{=order_treat_wounded_mid_dying_boy_move_text}Move on. There are living to help.

storylets.title: {=order_treat_wounded_mid_supply_shortage_title}The linen runs out
storylets.setup: {=order_treat_wounded_mid_supply_shortage_setup}Clean cloth is gone by midday. The surgeon eyes your own cloak. The wounded eye it too. Three more men are still waiting.

options.text: {=order_treat_wounded_mid_supply_shortage_cloak_text}Hand over the cloak. Cold is bearable.
{=order_treat_wounded_mid_supply_shortage_find_text}Ride for the sutler. Come back with linen.

storylets.title: {=order_treat_wounded_mid_rumours_title}Bedside talk
storylets.setup: {=order_treat_wounded_mid_rumours_setup}A wounded sergeant speaks half to himself about a captain who ran. Another man hushes him. You are close enough to hear, if you lean. Close enough not to hear, if you lean away.

options.text: {=order_treat_wounded_mid_rumours_listen_text}Lean close. Remember the names.
{=order_treat_wounded_mid_rumours_ignore_text}Mind your own work.

storylets.title: {=order_treat_wounded_mid_dead_man_ring_title}A signet, on cold fingers
storylets.setup: {=order_treat_wounded_mid_dead_man_ring_setup}A knight on the end pallet is gone. His signet ring is still on his hand — worth a season's pay. The surgeon is at the other end of the tent. The dead man's squire wept out and is not yet back.

options.text: {=order_treat_wounded_mid_dead_man_ring_take_text}Slip it into a pocket. Walk away.
{=order_treat_wounded_mid_dead_man_ring_leave_text}Leave it. For the squire.

storylets.title: {=order_treat_wounded_resolve_diligent_title}Tent emptied
storylets.setup: {=order_treat_wounded_resolve_diligent_setup}By evening the rows have thinned — some walked out, some were carried, one or two were covered. The surgeon claps a hand to your shoulder and says nothing, which from him is a great deal.

options.text: {=order_treat_wounded_resolve_diligent_done_text}Scrub your hands. Sit down.

storylets.title: {=order_treat_wounded_resolve_sociable_title}Names remembered
storylets.setup: {=order_treat_wounded_resolve_sociable_setup}You sat with men at the worst hour of their lives and did what little was needed — water, words, a name spoken aloud. They will remember. Many will not live long enough to say so, but some will.

options.text: {=order_treat_wounded_resolve_sociable_done_text}Fold the blankets. Walk into the night.

storylets.title: {=order_treat_wounded_resolve_slack_title}Clean hands
storylets.setup: {=order_treat_wounded_resolve_slack_setup}You carried water and stayed clear of the red parts. The surgeon watched. He says nothing to your face. He will say what needs saying later.

options.text: {=order_treat_wounded_resolve_slack_absorb_text}Wash up. Go.

storylets.title: {=order_treat_wounded_resolve_scheme_title}Silver from the wounded
storylets.setup: {=order_treat_wounded_resolve_scheme_setup}The tent is emptied. Your pocket is heavier. Men cried and men died, and through it you kept a part of yourself cool enough to count. Someone may have noticed. Someone may not.

options.text: {=order_treat_wounded_resolve_scheme_away_text}Walk out with the coin.
{=order_treat_wounded_resolve_scheme_caught_text}The squire pointed at you. Pay him.
